record.tool_name: DCOIR Airtable WBS09 Relative Date Popup Probe
record.trigger_conditions: Use when an Airtable native relative-date dropdown cannot be reliably selected and a scoped popup DOM/geometry/readback capture is needed before patching shared panel actions.
record.input_contract: Requires DCOIR_REPO_ROOT, DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR, Node.js, Playwright prerequisites, Airtable login in Chrome profile, WBS09 manifest, TargetKey, and FieldName such as review_after.
record.output_contract: Writes scoped popup DOM/HTML/geometry screenshots and logs under DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR/dcoir_wbs09_relative_date_popup_probe_*; does not mutate Airtable.
record.safety_preconditions: Read-only diagnostic only; captures scoped popup evidence, not full-page HTML unless separately approved. No typing, selecting final values, adding/removing filters, or broad rollout.
record.notes: Created during WBS09 recovery to diagnose Airtable relative-date dropdown behavior. Evidence from the probe guided the v15 shared panel action fix.
